title: Yuttah #3194
definition:
Juttah = "stretched out"

 1) a town in the mountains of Judah, in the neighbourhood of Maon and
    Carmel; modern 'Yutta'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Juttah = "stretched out"

 1) a town in the mountains of Judah, in the neighbourhood of Maon and
    Carmel; modern 'Yutta'

    NASB:  a city in Judah
